name: Sweet 'n' Spicy Onion Glaze
recipeIngredient: 8 oz (1 cup) Salad Dressing - Russian or Sweet 'n Sour
recipeInstructions:
1. Choose one of the following Salad Dressings: Russian or Sweet 'n Sour.
2. In a small bowl, blend all ingredients together.
3. Use the glaze for chicken, spare ribs, kabobs, hamburgers, or frankfurters.
4. Brush on during the last half of cooking.
